ham.subject: This Week's Top Marketing Strategies: Boost Your Brand with Our Latest Insights
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Hope you are doing great! Here are the top marketing insights for this week:
1. Personalization is key to connect with your audience.
2. Use data-driven content to target the right segments.
3. Leverage social media stories to boost engagement.
4. Optimize your landing pages for higher conversion rates.

Stay tuned for more!

Best regards,
Marketing Team

spam.subject: Congratulations! Secure Your Rs.5 Crore Scholarship Now – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Student,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected for a scholarship of Rs. 5 crore from XYZ University. To claim your scholarship, you must submit the required documents and pay a processing fee of Rs. 50,000 within 48 hours.

Please verify your details and complete the payment by clicking <URL>.

If you do not act within the stipulated time, your scholarship offer will be revoked.

Regards,
Dr. Arun Sharma,
Director, Scholarship Office, XYZ University
